dockerComposeFile:
services:
  runner:
    image: ghcr.io/tinycloudlabs/tinyagent-runner:0.1.0-lowkey-5e18dac
    restart: unless-stopped
    container_name: tinyagent-runner
    labels:
      tinyagent.pack: "openclaw"
      tinyagent.lowkey_ref: "inceptionstack/lowkey@5e18dac550f8cf0ac509e51679a6e41a6a90e528"
    ports:
      - "3001:3001"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/tappd.sock:/var/run/tappd.sock
      - tinyagent-data:/data
    environment:
      - GATEWAY_PORT=3001
volumes:
  tinyagent-data:
name: tinyagent-openclaw
